mapper.select:
SELECT PROCS_ID, PROCS_NM, PROCS_SN FROM RDIPROCSINFO_TB
WHERE PROCS_ID = #{procs_id}
WHERE PROCS_ID != 'PROCS_10'
ORDER BY PROCS_SN
SELECT CD_SE, CD_ID, CD_NM, CD_DESC FROM RDICMMNCD_TB WHERE CD_SE = 'CD100' ORDER BY CD_SN
SELECT CD_SE, CD_ID, CD_NM, CD_DESC FROM RDICMMNCD_TB WHERE CD_SE = 'CD101' ORDER BY CD_SN

SELECT CD_SE, CD_ID, CD_NM, CD_DESC FROM RDICMMNCD_TB
WHERE CD_SE IN ('CD102', 'CD103', 'CD104', 'CD106')
WHERE CD_SE = #{fclt_id}
ORDER BY CD_SN
SELECT CD_SE, CD_ID, CD_NM, CD_DESC FROM RDICMMNCD_TB WHERE CD_SE = 'CD203' ORDER BY CD_SN
